body:
The amount specified in column (2) below in respect of each person or couple specified in column (1) is the amount specified for the purposes of paragraph 6(1)(a) of Schedule 1.
| Column (1) | Column (2) |
| --- | --- |
| Person or couple | Amount |
| (1) Single applicant or lone parent who has attained pensionable age before 1st April 2021 | £256.00 |
| (2) Couple where one or both members have attained pensionable age before 1st April 2021 | £383.35 |
| (3) If the applicant is a member of a polygamous marriage and one or more members of the marriage have attained pensionable age before 1st April 2021 — |  |
| (a) for the applicant and the other party to the marriage; | (a) £383.35 |
| (b) for each additional spouse who is a member of the same household as the applicant. | (b) £127.35 |
| (4) Single applicant or lone parent who has attained pensionable age on or after 1st April 2021 | £238.00 |
| (5) Couple where both members have attained pensionable age on or after 1st April 2021 | £363.25 |
| (6) If the applicant is a member of a polygamous marriage and all members of the marriage have attained pensionable age on or after 1st April 2021— |  |
| (a) for the applicant and the other party to the marriage; | (a) £363.25 |
| (b) for each additional spouse who is a member of the same household as the applicant | (b) £125.25. |
heading: Schedule 2 Part 1 paragraph 1 - Personal allowance

body:
The amounts specified in column (2) below in respect of each person specified in column (1) are the amounts, for the relevant period specified in column (1), specified for the purposes of paragraph 6(1)(b) of Schedule 1.
Column (1)
Child or young person
Column (2)
Amount
Person in respect of the period—
beginning on that person’s date of birth and ending on the day preceding the first Monday in September following that person’s sixteenth birthday;
£87.88;
beginning on the first Monday in September following that person’s sixteenth birthday and ending on the day preceding that person’s twentieth birthday.
£87.88.
In column (1) of the table “the first Monday in September” means the Monday which first occurs in the month of September in any year.
| Column (1)Child or young person | Column (2)Amount |
| --- | --- |
| Person in respect of the period— |  |
| beginning on that person’s date of birth and ending on the day preceding the first Monday in September following that person’s sixteenth birthday; | £87.88; |
| beginning on the first Monday in September following that person’s sixteenth birthday and ending on the day preceding that person’s twentieth birthday. | £87.88. |
heading: Schedule 2 Part 1 paragraph 2 - Child or young person amounts
Schedule 2 Part 2 paragraph 3 - Family premium

body:
Severe Disability Premium—
where the applicant satisfies the condition in paragraph 6(2)(a);
£86.05;
where the applicant satisfies the condition in paragraph 6(2)(b)—
in a case where there is someone in receipt of a carer’s allowance or carer support payment or who has an award of universal credit which includes the carer element under regulation 29 of the Universal Credit Regulations 2013, or if he or any partner satisfies that condition only by virtue of paragraph 6(7);
£86.05;
in a case where there is no-one in receipt of such an allowance or payment or such an award of universal credit.
£172.10.
Enhanced disability premium.
£33.99 in respect of each child or young person in respect of whom the conditions specified in paragraph 7 are satisfied.
Disabled Child Premium.
£84.46 in respect of each child or young person in respect of whom the condition specified in paragraph 8 is satisfied
Carer Premium.
£48.15 in respect of each person who satisfies the condition specified in paragraph 9.
